results.title: Lead Machine Learning Engineer, Recommender Systems | Remotepulse
highlights:
Lead Machine Learning Engineer, Recommender Systems | Remotepulse
...
# Lead Machine Learning Engineer, Recommender Systems
...
HP IQ is HP’s new AI innovation lab. Combining startup agility with HP’s global scale, we’re building intelligent technologies that redefine how the world works, creates, and collaborates.
...
By embedding AI advancements into every HP product and service, we’re expanding what’s possible for individuals, organisations, and the future of work.
...
### About The Role
...
As a Lead Machine Learning Engineer – Recommender Systems, you’ll play a central role in improving HP’s Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines for private and local data. You’ll build intelligent, context-aware retrieval systems that enhance user interactions with documents, meetings, and applications—all on-device. This role blends deep ML experience with product-focused engineering.
...
- What You Might Do
...
- Drive the design, implementation, and scaling of recommendation and retrieval algorithms for our AI Companion app
- Set the technical vision for vector search and similarity matching models to identify relevant documents across structured and unstructured data
- Analyze user interactions and system performance to guide algorithmic improvements
- Partner with cross-functional leaders in ML, infrastructure, and product teams to deploy fast and efficient RAG workflows
- Build and maintain retrieval indexes optimized for latency and memory
- Mentor and guide engineers across the team, fostering best practices in experimentation, model evaluation, and production deployment.
...
- Essential Qualifications
...
- 8+ years of software development experience with exposure to ML engineering
- Deep expertise in recommender systems, embeddings, and ranking models
- Proven experience building or scaling document search or retrieval systems
- Strong understanding of vector databases (e.g., FAISS, Pinecone, Qdrant)
- Proficient in Python and one systems language (e.g., C++, Java)

- Preferred Skills
- Background in LLM integration or fine-tuning for RAG workflows
- Industry experience at companies like Google (Search, YouTube), Meta (Feed, Ads), or Twitter (Timeline, Trends)
- Experience with ML pipeline tools (Airflow, Ray, TorchServe)
- Previous experience improving search relevance, click-through rate, or long-term engagement
...
### Salary Range: $175,000 - $275,000
...
- HP IQ is HP’s new AI innovation lab, building the intelligence to empower humanity—reimagining how we work, create, and connect to shape the future of work.
...
- Help shape the future of intelligent computing and workplace transformation.
...
- Work with the speed and focus of a startup, backed by HP’s scale.
...
- Build AI-powered solutions that help people and organisations thrive.

...
HP is seeking an ** AI Product Manager** to define, build, and scale AI-driven products and capabilities across our enterprise platform landscape (e.g., SAP, ServiceNow, MuleSoft, Adobe Commerce, and automation platforms). This role is accountable for **end-to-end product ownership**, including opportunity identification, product strategy, roadmap development, requirements definition, backlog management, delivery partnership with engineering, and ongoing adoption and optimization.
...
The ideal candidate brings a strong **learning mindset and curiosity**, practical familiarity with **AI product management**, and a **technical foundation** enabling effective partnership with engineering and architecture teams.
...
**AI Product Strategy & Innovation**
...
* Identify, evaluate, and prioritize AI and automation opportunities across enterprise platforms and business processes.
...
* Define product vision, outcomes, and roadmap aligned to business priorities and platform strategy. 
* Assess platform-native AI capabilities versus custom-built solutions to maximize value, speed, and scalability.
...
* Partner closely with platform engineering, architecture, security, operations, and business stakeholders to deliver value at enterprise scale. 
* Provide clear communication on product direction, tradeoffs, milestones, risks, and outcomes to senior stakeholders. 
**AI Governance, Responsible AI & Risk Management**
...
* Ensure AI products align to responsible AI principles and enterprise expectations for compliance, security, and privacy. 
* Contribute to governance practices that reduce risk (e.g., model behavior, data exposure, operational controls) while enabling innovation at speed. 
**Metrics, Adoption & Value Realization**
...
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, Data Science or related field
...
* Significant experience in product management across digital/software products, with **demonstrated exposure to AI/ML or GenAI concepts and use cases**. 
* Strong product fundamentals: discovery, requirements definition, prioritization, backlog hygiene, and release execution. 
* Demonstrated ability to influence and align cross-functional stakeholders in a matrixed enterprise environment.
...
* Technical background in software engineering, data, or applied AI/ML; ability to engage with engineering teams on feasibility, architecture considerations, and delivery tradeoffs.
...
* Experience with LLMs, prompt engineering, and responsible AI practices. 
* Exposure to GenAI platforms and cloud AI services (e.g., Azure AI and similar). 
* Experience with AI deployment patterns, or scaling AI solutions across large organizations
...
* Experience building AI-powered products or intelligent automation solutions

## Job description
...
HP PageWide Industrial operates at the intersection of high‑performance hardware, industrial software, and real‑time data at factory scale. This role is for a senior architect who wants to shape how industrial presses connect to cloud platforms, partner ecosystems, and AI‑enabled solutions—unlocking real‑time productivity insights and enabling the next generation of intelligent, autonomous press operations.
...
This role is responsible for partnering across solution delivery organizations to define the PWI press data strategy and APIs that integrate our presses with customer factory management systems, third-party analytics and workflow solutions, robotics, and the HP PrintOS platform and applications.
...
* Own and lead the end-to-end ecosystem integration architecture; consider the data, systems, and workflows spanning many domains including presses, jobs, attached or involved devices, AI capabilities and agents, and partner systems within factory settings and associated cloud services.
...
* Explore, prototype, and validate AI-enabled use cases leveraging press and factory data.
...
**Education & Experience Required**
...
* Four-year or Graduate Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Statistics/ Mathematics, or any other related discipline or commensurate work experience or demonstrated competence.
...
* Typically has
...
high-performant industrial software, data engineering, cloud platforms
...
or a related field.
...

...
* Hands-on experience with applied AI/ML systems, analytics platforms, or data science collaboration.
...

* AI Domains for Industrial Applications
* computer vision, agentic AI, predictive maintenance, anomaly detection, troubleshooting

Software Technical Program Manager - HP Digital Products Team
...
The Digital Products team is responsible for the design, build, and deployment of world class AI enabled products and solutions that empower a future ready workforce, drive efficiencies via automation and support implementation of newer business operating models for HP’s business. With a focus on Innovation, the group drives differentiation with architectural vision to consolidate, accelerate and simplify new technology adoption and deliver high value solutions that solve the pain points of all its stakeholders.
...
Are you ready to take on an exhilarating challenge as a Software Technical Program Manager (TPM) for HP's Digital Products Team? HP is providing an extraordinary opportunity to join a global technology leader and drive the development of cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning products. As a TPM, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the future of HP's software solutions, working with top-tier talent and leveraging the latest technologies. If you're a dynamic and ambitious professional seeking an adrenaline-fueled career, this is the perfect role for you!
...

...
- Technical Prowess: Harness your deep technical expertise in software development methodologies, cloud-based platforms, and AI/ML-based systems/platforms. Your insights and expertise will shape the technical direction, ensure high-quality delivery, and overcome complex challenges.
...
- Innovation and Continuous Improvement: Fuel a culture of constant innovation, pushing the boundaries of what's possible. Inspire the team to explore emerging technologies, adopt new tools, and continually improve development practices to maintain HP's position as a technological frontrunner.

### Qualifications

- Technical expertise in cloud-based platforms, modern software tools, processes, and related technologies that put you at the cutting of the latest industry trends.

results.title: Sachin Sorout
highlights:
Junior Data Scientist @ HP Inc. | Production-Grade GenAI & NLP Pipelines | LLMs · RAG · FAISS · vLLM · Python · SQL · Power BI
...
I'm a Data Scientist at HP Inc. who builds production-grade AI systems — pipelines that ship, run every week, and drive real marketing decisions across global teams, not proofs of concept that sit in a notebook. My path wasn't linear. I built a foundation in Mathematics & Statistics (M.Sc.), started my career as a data analyst creating dashboards and sentiment-analysis pipelines, and grew into the Generative AI and NLP engineering work I'm most excited about today. At HP, I work at the intersection of LLMs and enterprise marketing intelligence. A few things I've built: Intelligent Account Name Matching Pipeline — a multi-step NLP + LLM system (RapidFuzz, TF-IDF, FAISS, Qwen3) deployed on Amazon SageMaker with vLLM, resolving company identities at scale. It earned recognition from L3 & L4 leadership. Automated Company Data Enrichment Pipeline — enriches 1,000+ company records weekly at 96%+ accuracy, eliminating days of manual research and third-party outsourcing. Lightweight Marketing Mix Model (Robyn) measuring media impact across APJ markets, plus a multi-touch attribution upgrade for HP Japan's $400M PS business. I also own weekly ETL and data-quality assurance for Power BI dashboards used by senior management, and I've contributed to HP's $1.3B in Marketing Generated Opportunities across FY25–FY26. What drives me: turning messy, scattered data into systems people actually trust and use. I care about production rigor — latency, accuracy, fallback logic, data quality — not just notebook metrics. I'm currently deepening my expertise through a PG programme in Data Science & ML at Scaler.com, and I'm always open to connecting with people working on applied LLMs, NLP, RAG systems, or marketing analytics. Core stack: Python · SQL · LLMs · RAG · LangChain · FAISS · vLLM · Ollama · Scikit-learn · Tableau · Power BI · Amazon SageMaker · Databricks Open to opportunities in Data Science, ML Engineering & Applied AI.
...
Junior Data Scientist working at the intersection of Generative AI, NLP, and enterprise marketing intelligence — designing and deploying production-grade AI systems used across HP's global marketing organization. Key work: Intelligent Account Name Matching Pipeline — Built a multi-step NLP + LLM system to resolve company identities against HP's internal database (STIDs/OrgIDs). Combined Fuzzy Matching (RapidFuzz) and TF-IDF cosine similarity with Qwen3 embeddings indexed in FAISS for Top-K ANN search, then Qwen3 4B Instruct for zero-shot reranking. Deployed on Amazon SageMaker with vLLM for batched, low-latency inference. Recognized by L3 & L4 leadership. Automated Company Data Enrichment Pipeline — Enriched 1,000+ company records weekly at 96%+ accuracy using Ollama-based LLMs, multi-account key rotation, and anti-bot Google scraping (Selenium + Stealth.js), with two-step domain validation to eliminate hallucination. Removed days of manual research and outsourcing cost. Marketing Mix Modelling (APJ) — Built a lightweight MMM using Robyn (regularized regression, adstock, Bayesian optimization) delivering channel-level ROI and ~5% projected improvement in media spend efficiency. Campaign Reporting & Multi-Touch Attribution — Built SQL/Python pipelines on Adobe Analytics feeds for monthly reporting to regional CMOs and 50+ managers across 6 countries; upgraded HP Japan's $400M attribution framework on Databricks. Own weekly ETL and data-quality assurance for Power BI dashboards used by senior management; contributed to HP's $1.3B Marketing Generated Opportunities (FY25–FY26). Stack: Python

My love for technology began in the pre-Internet era, when I grew up tinkering with tools and dismantled toys, which has continued to this day. In my current role as a Machine Learning Engineer, I design and develop scalable, customer-centric AI applications for both text and image modalities, with tools like generative models, databases, agents and services. Furthermore, my work environment is quite diverse, which is common in many large technology companies nowadays, encompassing a wide range of applications from backend and frontend to desktop and mobile. I also bring a strong background in object-oriented programming, operating systems, version control tools, agile methodologies, innovation processes, and cutting-edge technologies. In addition to my expertise in the areas mentioned, I know about the Internet of Things, embedded systems, computer vision, robotics, and related fields. Over the course of my career, I have had the opportunity to work on several projects that have allowed me to gain hands-on experience in these areas. results.title: HPE Data Science & AI Analyst Jobs 2026 Bangalore
highlights:
# HPE Data Science & AI Analyst Jobs 2026: Apply for Bangalore Role
...
Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) is a global edge-to-cloud company that helps organizations accelerate outcomes by unlocking value from all their data. In 2026, HPE is actively expanding its AI and data science workforce, particularly in Bangalore – India’s tech hub. The Data Science and AI Analyst role is not just another analytics job; it sits at the intersection of traditional data science and the emerging Generative AI wave. With HPE’s focus on hybrid cloud, AI-native solutions, and GreenLake, this role offers freshers and early-career professionals a rare opportunity to work on production-level AI systems that impact global enterprise clients. The position demands a blend of classical statistical rigor and modern LLM skills, making it a bellwether for where the industry is heading.
...
| Company | Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) |
| --- | --- |
| Role | Data Science and AI Analyst |
| Location | Bangalore, Karnataka, India |
| Experience | Freshers (Master's) or 2-3 Years (Bachelor's) |
| Education | Master's in Statistics, OR, CS or Bachelor's + 2-3 years exp. |
| Salary | Not Disclosed (Estimated ₹8-14 LPA based on role & company standards) |
...
HPE has set a two-track eligibility. The preferred path is a Master’s degree in Statistics, Operations Research, Computer Science, or a directly equivalent field. Candidates with a Bachelor’s degree in these areas must bring at least 2-3 years of relevant experience to compensate. This dual requirement means that fresh Master’s graduates are the primary target, but Bachelor’s holders with proven industry exposure (e.g., internships, prior roles in analytics) are also considered. Importantly, the company expects proficiency in both classical methods (regression, forecasting) and cutting-edge GenAI/LLMs—so a purely academic background without hands-on projects in these areas may be a disadvantage. Candidates from tier-1/2 colleges or those with published work on Kaggle or GitHub will have a stronger profile.
...
- Apply business knowledge to define analytic objectives and solve client problems using data.
- Develop and maintain metadata, hypothesis matrices, and prepare data for Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA).
- Build, validate, and enhance machine learning models to support overall business solutions.
- Create compelling data visualizations using Power BI to communicate model insights to stakeholders.
...
- Data Science & Statistical Modeling
- Generative AI & Large Language Models (LLMs)
- Python & SQL
- Machine Learning Frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch)
- Data Visualization (Power BI)
- ETL Tools (SSIS, Informatica, Talend)
- Business Requirement Translation
- Global Collaboration & Communication
...
Fresh Master’s graduates in Statistics, Operations Research, Computer Science, or equivalent fields. Also, Bachelor’s degree holders with at least 2-3 years of relevant data science experience. Candidates must have skills in classical statistics, GenAI/LLMs, Python, SQL, and data visualization.
...
Click the ‘Apply Link’ provided in the job description, which redirects to HPE’s official career portal. Complete the application form, upload your resume, and ensure it highlights your GenAI projects and statistical modeling expertise. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, so early submission is recommended.

results.title: VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services | CareerSync
highlights:
, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services
...
# VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services
...
About the Role & TeamIDC is seeking a transformative AI leader to define and execute our enterprise-wide AI strategy—embedding cutting-edge artificial intelligence across both internal operations and customer-facing products. This is a rare opportunity to shape how a global data and intelligence company harnesses AI, from agentic workflows and large language models to predictive analytics and AI-native product experiences. Reporting directly to the CTO, the VP of AI will lead a high-performing technical team, partner across business units, and drive measurable business impact through intelligent, responsible, and scalable AI solutions. The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise in modern AI—including generative AI, LLMs, and agentic systems—with the strategic acumen to align AI investments to revenue growth and competitive differentiation. IDC sits at the intersection of proprietary data, expert human insight, and global technology reach—an ideal foundation for AI transformation. Key opportunity areas include: AI-augmented research & analyst productivity — deploying LLM-powered tools to accelerate data synthesis, report generation, and market forecasting. Intelligent data products — embedding predictive models and AI-driven insights directly into IDC's subscription and advisory offerings. Agentic content & marketing workflows — leveraging generative AI to personalize content, automate content pipelines, and optimize Foundry's MarTech capabilities. Enterprise AI infrastructure — building shared platforms, APIs, and MLOps practices that enable AI adoption at scale across all IDC business units. What You’ll Do
...
AI Strategy & Vision: Partner with the CEO, CTO, CIO, and business unit heads to define IDC's multi-year AI roadmap—spanning generative AI, agentic systems, predictive analytics, and AI-native product development. Technical Leadership: Architect and oversee IDC's AI platform and infrastructure, ensuring scalability, security, and alignment with enterprise data strategy. Product Delivery: Develop and execute IDC’s approach to agentic AI technology, thereby delivering the centerpiece of IDC Quanta, our cross-channel technology intelligence layer. Team Building: Recruit, develop, and retain a world-class AI team spanning ML engineers, data scientists, AI product managers, and MLOps specialists. Stakeholder Alignment: Translate complex AI capabilities into clear business value for executives and department heads; maintain transparent goals and resource planning. Ecosystem & Partnerships: Evaluate and manage AI technology partnerships, vendor relationships, and open-source contributions to accelerate IDC's AI capabilities. What You Bring
...
PhD. or Master's degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, Statistics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience).
...
7+ years of experience in applied machine learning, AI engineering, or data science—with at least 3 years in senior technical leadership roles.
...
impact (revenue growth,
...
reduction, or product differentiation).
...
Deep expertise in modern AI/ML and agentic/generative systems design.
...
Hands-on fluency with generative AI technologies: LLM fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and agentic frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen).
...
Strong engineering foundation: Python, SQL, cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure ML), and modern MLOps practices (CI/CD, model monitoring, feature stores).
...
Familiarity with knowledge graphs, semantic search, or AI applications in content and market research workflows.
...
Experience with responsible AI frameworks, model governance, and AI regulatory compliance (EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF).
...
Track record of building AI developer platforms or shared ML infrastructure used by multiple product teams.

Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...

This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.

- Design, implement, and deploy machine learning models with a focus on generative AI (diffusion models, LLMs, and related architectures)
...
- Fine-tune, evaluate, and optimize large language models for specific downstream tasks and data needs
...
- Develop and maintain scalable data pipelines supporting training, evaluation, and inference workflows
...
- Partner cross-functionally with researchers, engineers, and data program managers to define requirements and deliver high-impact ML solutions
...
- REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS:
...
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field from an accredited U.S. institution
- 2+ years of experience in Machine Learning or Software Engineering
- Expert-level proficiency in Python and familiarity with deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch
...
- Strong foundation in machine learning algorithms, data preprocessing, and evaluation techniques
...
- Demonstrated experience working with diffusion models, stable diffusion, or large language models (LLMs)

company advancing the

...
new and better ways

what’s next

Develops and programs integrated software algorithms to structure, analyze and leverage structured and unstructured data in product and systems applications. Can work with large scale computing frameworks, data analysis systems, and modeling environments.
...
Uses machine learning and statistical modeling techniques to improve product/system performance, data management, quality, and accuracy. Formulates descriptive, diagnostic, predictive and prescriptive insights/algorithms and translates technical specifications into code. Applies, optimizes and scales deep learning technologies and algorithms to give computers the capability to visualize, learn and respond to complex situations. Documents procedures for installation and maintenance, completes programming, performs testing and debugging, defines and monitors performance metrics.
...
Contributes to the success of HPE by translating customer requirements and industry trends into AI/ML products, solutions, and systems improvement projects.
...
- Responsible for conducting advanced research in AI and machine learning. This includes staying up to date with the latest advancements in the field, exploring emerging technologies, and identifying opportunities to apply cutting-edge techniques to solve complex business problems.
...
- Tasked with designing and architecting AI solutions for complex problems. This involves analyzing business requirements, understanding constraints, and proposing appropriate machine learning models and algorithms.
...
- Works closely with stakeholders, such as product managers, data scientists, and business analysts, to understand their requirements and translate them into technical solutions. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure alignment and successful AI and machine learning project implementation.
...
- Responsible for driving continuous improvement and innovation in the organization's AI and machine learning practices. This involves identifying areas of improvement, exploring new techniques or technologies, and promoting the adoption of best practices.

Proficient in model selection, hyperparameter tuning, and evaluating model performance using appropriate metrics.
...
- A strong foundation in mathematics and statistics. In-depth knowledge of linear algebra, calculus, probability theory, and statistical concepts. Understanding and developing complex machine learning models and algorithms.
...
- Advanced knowledge and experience in deep learning. Understanding advanced neural network architectures (e.g., convolutional neural networks, recurrent neural networks, transformers) and advanced techniques such as transfer learning, generative models, and optimization algorithms for deep learning.
...
- Actively staying updated with the latest AI and machine learning research advancements. Experience conducting research, exploring emerging technologies, and identifying opportunities to apply state-of-the-art techniques to solve complex problems.

results.title: Senior Generative AI Engineer (Engineer Machine Learning 4) - 26195 | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Generative AI Engineer (Engineer Machine Learning 4) - 26195 | Wfh
...
# Senior Generative AI Engineer (Engineer Machine Learning 4) - 26195
...
- Meet HII's Mission Technologies Division
- Our team of more than 7,000 professionals worldwide delivers all-domain expertise and advanced technologies in service of mission partners across the globe. Mission Technologies is leading the next evolution of national defense - the data evolution - by accelerating a breadth of national security solutions for government and commercial customers. Our capabilities range from C5ISR, AI and Big Data, cyber operations and synthetic training environments to fleet sustainment, environmental remediation and the largest family of unmanned underwater vehicles in every class. Find the role that's right for you. Apply today. We look forward to meeting you.
...
HII-Mission Technologies is seeking a Senior Generative AI Engineer to join the team. This will be a remote position, with occasional travel to the team's office in Annapolis Junction, MD. This role will support the team in creating and managing end-to-end generative AI solutions. The team supports AI and digital modernization for both internal use and for external clients, with applications from intelligence analysis to manufacturing optimization.
...
- Operational AI Implementation: Research, develop, and apply machine learning, deep learning, and large language model (LLM) techniques for deployment in operational environments.
...
- Full Stack Design and Development: Rapidly design and create prototype applications to demonstrate AI capabilities. Transition prototypes to production by designing and implementing well-architected, scalable software stacks.
...
- Client Engagement: Support meetings with internal clients and external customers as a subject matter expert in AI and advanced software solutions, with a focus on cloud technologies and generative AI.
...
- 9 years relevant experience with Bachelors in related field; 7 years relevant experience with Masters in related field; 4 years relevant experience with PhD or Juris Doctorate in realted field; or High School Diploma or equivalent and 13 years relevant experience.
...
- Programming languages
...
- Containerized development and deployment: Docker, Rancher, and/or K8s.
- Cloud engineering: Azure, AWS, or GCP.
- Databases: SQL, NoSQL, and/or vector databases.
...
- Hands-on experience with current open-source LLMs and ecosystem tools (e.g., model serving, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, embeddings).
- Experience developing generative AI products or platforms, including multimodal use cases (e.g., text, vision, audio, document understanding).
...
- Bachelors in Data Science, Computer Science, Mathematics, or equivalent technologies/experience.
- Experience with:
...
- UI/UX development: JavaScript (Angular, React).
- Backend development: REST API, web apps, microservices.
- Experience supporting feature development and maintenance for an enterprise-scale application.
- Experience building multi-step agentic workflows and orchestrators using frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, PromptGraph, or custom in-house pipelines.
...
- We build the world's most powerful, survivable naval ships and defense technology solutions that safeguard our seas, sky, land, space and cyber. Our workforce includes skilled tradespeople; artificial intelligence, machine learning (AI/ML) experts; engineers; technologists; scientists; logistics experts; and business administration professionals.
